old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-sl32.3","title":"Heltec V3 6LBR: RPL root + upstream prefix delegation integration","description":"Extend lichen_rpl_dodag_init_root() and gateway_rpl_init() in main.c / subsys/lichen/rpl/ to use prefix learned from WiFi backhaul (via net_if or DHCPv6/ND). Ensure non-storing mode source routing works with WiFi upstream. Add bridging between LoRa L2 net_if and WiFi net_if. new_value: Updated gateway_rpl_init() in main.c to set DODAG ID based on CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION (fd00::/64 stub for upstream WiFi prefix). Prepares full net_if/DIO advertisement and bridging per spec. Integrates with sl32.1 Kconfig.
